title: Bray's Better Bow & Arrows
description: Greatly improves the look of bows and crossbows by loading and firing 3D projectiles! Works with "Real Arrow Tip" to show spectral and tipped arrow projectiles!
body:
<center>

![Banner Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d7696391d9ea93617ef7c08f2af53f25d12b419.png)

</center>
  
### Bray's Better 3D Bow!
Add a touch of something special to your bow and crossbow usage with 3D projectiles! Also comes with support for [Real Arrow Tip](https://modrinth.com/mod/real-arrow-tip) so you can see exactly which projectiles you're firing!

**NOTE:** _Versions of Minecraft **prior to 1.21.4** may not work as intended due to vanilla item model limitations_

<center>

![Custom items Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d2a55fc1d348c4b225644674e5af05fa5fc4b5f.png)

</center>

### Sprite Upgrades!
- Custom Sprites
  - Updated Arrows
  - Updated Spectral Arrows
  - New Tipped Arrows
  - New Rocket Sprite
- Custom Crossbow sprites when loaded with Multishot Enchant

**NOTE:** Using [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts), you may toggle between using vanilla textures for the bow and arrows and the custom textures that were designed for the pack.

<center>
  
![Bow Projectile Types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c00a6d931b7bccd7a3f8f17750091b5809de5c45.jpeg)

</center>

**Bow Projectile Types**

<center>

![Crossbow Projectile Types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22c5ec99e71b67865b6fe43bc79f8a745a1b17eb.jpeg)

</center>

**Crossbow Projectile Types**

---------------


### Unique left-handed & right-handed models!
**(feature only functional in Minecraft 1.21.4+)**

It was important to have unique models for when the bow was in your right or left hand so that the arrow was realistically always close to the body

![unique left and right models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4da6e0be60cfe497b34a4a4ae2f06337d59b25e.jpeg)

---------------

# [Check out my other work!](https://modrinth.com/user/Braytonks)

[![Bray's World Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb564d2b41517ff14a0ef541c06bbd61cbb8ac96.jpeg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/braysworld)

### Bray's World: A Vanilla+ Experience!
I love all of my packs but ["Bray's World"](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/braysworld) is definitely my baby <3 If you like the quality of what you see here, please feel free to check that pack out. It does a little bit of everything including custom textures and models, variated mob textures, animations and more, and even has support for [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) so there's plenty of settings to toggle to get exactly what you want!

<center>
